starter_intents.title: Photo
starter_intents.description: Portraits, editorial scenes, and natural-light photography.
starter_intents.starter_prompt: A cinematic portrait in natural window light, detailed skin texture, professional photography

starter_intents.title: Illustration
starter_intents.description: Stylized art, concepts, and graphic key visuals.
starter_intents.starter_prompt: A bold editorial illustration of a futuristic city at sunrise, vibrant colors, digital art

starter_intents.title: Product Mockup
starter_intents.description: Commercial product shots with clean, brand-safe framing.
starter_intents.starter_prompt: Premium skincare bottle on a textured studio set with soft shadows, product photography

styles.label: Cinematic
styles.positive: {prompt}, cinematic lighting, dramatic composition, film grain, high dynamic range
styles.negative: flat lighting, overexposed, washed out, low contrast

sdxl.positive: subtle lens depth, premium tonal rolloff

styles.label: Illustration
styles.positive: {prompt}, editorial illustration, painterly detail, clean silhouettes, rich color harmony
styles.negative: photographic noise, 3d render artifacts, muddy lines

styles.label: Anime
styles.positive: {prompt}, anime key visual, expressive eyes, clean linework, vibrant palette
styles.negative: realistic skin pores, uncanny face, extra limbs, malformed hands

styles.label: Product Shot
styles.positive: {prompt}, studio product photography, controlled highlights, clean reflections, minimal backdrop
styles.negative: cluttered background, soft focus, lens dirt, motion blur

styles.label: Concept Art
styles.positive: {prompt}, concept art, atmosphere depth, volumetric light, strong focal storytelling
styles.negative: flat depth, blank background, low detail, repetitive texture

negative_prompt_chips.label: Anatomy
negative_prompt_chips.fragment: extra limbs, malformed hands, deformed anatomy

negative_prompt_chips.label: Bad Framing
negative_prompt_chips.fragment: cropped, out of frame, cut off subject
